title: Point One Products 120m WIDE MASKING TAPE. 4 ROLLS. Thick Masking Tape for Painting and Decorating - Multi-Use Paper Tape. 4 x 30m rolls of 48mm Low Tack Masking Tape
features: ✅ Extra Wide Masking Tape for protection when painting and decorating. Use to line walls or mask areas that need to be free from paint or use to keep a straight edge.
✅ 4 Rolls of 48mm Wide Decorating Tape. Meaning you get 120m worth of low tack masking tape wide enough to line several walls without running out. Over 400 feet of thick masking tape.

✅ This top quality wide masking tapes will protect surfaces, skirting boards and power sockets whilst you paint and decorate walls. A great paint shield tool. Low tack masking tape for all your needs.
✅ Use this wide 50mm masking tape to easily tape down carpet protectors and plastic dust sheets. It is wide to give you full control and make application super easy. One of the best masking tapes.
✅ Decorating tape measuring just 2mm short of masking tape 50mm. This masking tape for painting 50mm will do everything you need to ensure even straight lines whilst painting and decorating.
description: Product Description This 48mm wide masking tape from Point One Products is the perfect solution for all your painting and decorating needs. Whether you're a professional painter or DIY enthusiast, this top-quality masking tape will help you achieve crisp, clean paint lines and flawless results every time. With its low tack adhesive, this masking tape is easy to apply and remove, making it ideal for use on delicate surfaces such as wallpaper, freshly painted walls, and more. It is also perfect for creating intricate designs and patterns. The 48mm width of this masking tape provides ample coverage, making it easy to work with and ensuring that you get the job done quickly and efficiently. It is also highly durable and can withstand a range of temperatures and conditions, making it perfect for use in all kinds of environments. If you're looking for a reliable and high-quality masking tape for painting, decorators tape, or decorating tape, look no further than Point One Products. Add this top-quality masking tape to your toolkit today and experience the difference for yourself! WIDE MASKING TAPE Point One Products Ltd EXTRA WIDE Extra Wide Masking Tape for protection when painting and decorating. Use to line walls or mask areas that need to be free from paint or use to keep a straight edge. 120 METRES 4 30m Rolls of 48mm Wide Painting Tape. Meaning you get 120m worth of low tack masking tape, enough to line several walls without running out. Over 400 feet of wide masking tape. PROTECT This top quality paint tape will protect surfaces, skirting boards and power sockets whilst you paint and decorate walls. A great paint shield tool. Masking tape for all your needs. DUST SHEET PLACEMENT Use this wide masking tape to easily tape down carpet protection film and plastic dust sheets. It is wide to give you full control and make application super easy. WARNING NOT RECOMMENDED FOR USE ON VEHICLE PAINT. PLEASE USE AUTOMOTIVE TAPE FOR SUCH JOBS.
